seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Michael Leunig sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “A good memory is surely a compost heap that converts experience to wisdom, creativity, or dottine……

frase_original: A good memory is surely a compost heap that converts experience to wisdom, creativity, or dottiness; not that these things are of much earthly value, but at least they may keep you amused when the world is keeping you locked away or shutting you out.
